ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "page" INTEGER /* Page number associated with the dataset */,
  "mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic for the dataset */,
  "cls_id" TEXT /* Class/ID for the dataset */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the dataset in bytes */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., Periodic, Polled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which the dataset was collected */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Exact time of data collection */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the dataset file is stored */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., GNSS, INS) */,
  "transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Transmission protocol used by the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the data source (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Precision level of the data type */,
  "example_value" TEXT /* Example value for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_sources" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the access request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
